name: Admin
description: Professional admin theme inspired by Drupal's Gin, with dark mode and responsive sidebar
author: CMS Core

sticky_header.label: Sticky Header
sticky_header.description: Keep the top toolbar fixed when scrolling

show_breadcrumb.label: Show Breadcrumb
show_breadcrumb.description: Display breadcrumb navigation below the toolbar

accent_color.label: Accent Color
accent_color.description: Primary color used for links, buttons, and active states

sidebar_width.label: Sidebar Width
sidebar_width.description: Width of the admin sidebar navigation

layout.label: Layout
layout.description: Control the overall admin layout behavior
